creator: wcosug@gmail.com
text:
1. http://wcosug.org/ 
2. Charles McLaine wcosug@gmail.com
3. "WCOSUG is The Western Connecticut Open Source User Group. Unlike Linux User Groups we also recognize the BSD.s and other operating systems. We are based in Fairfield County, CT, we have several users based on the CT, NY border and due to lack of an Eastern NY User Group I feel that it is my job to pull up the slack and help these users out. "
